overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. The camera moves steadily through a grassy, wooded area, passing a large tree on the left side. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring dark atmospheric lighting and natural terrain textures.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk along a narrow dirt trail at night. The path is illuminated by a warm artificial light source, revealing tall grass on both sides and a dark tree line in the distance. The environment is quiet and empty, with no other agents present.

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, a large pine tree trunk becomes visible on the left side of the path. The camera passes by the tree, which gradually moves from the mid-ground to the background. The trail remains consistent with tall grass borders and the dark tree line ahead, maintaining the quiet, isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression along a secluded dirt trail at night, moving from an open path toward a wooded encounter. It begins with a walk through tall grass illuminated by a warm artificial light source, with a dark, distant tree line framing the horizon. As the camera advances, the narrow path remains consistent while a large pine tree trunk emerges from the darkness on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the tree, watching it recede from the mid-ground into the background. Finally, the movement continues forward into the quiet, isolated environment, maintaining the same focused beam of light against the surrounding shadows.
